integration_sequence.name: baseline-verification
integration_sequence.description: Verify proof registry baseline manifest and sidecar sha256 before runtime integration.

integration_sequence.name: handover-package-verification
integration_sequence.description: Verify the integration handover package references the current baseline manifest.

integration_sequence.name: runtime-surface-wiring
integration_sequence.description: Wire control-plane runtime against app/security implementation surfaces and scripts.

integration_sequence.name: proof-suite-gate
integration_sequence.description: Run proof suite before runtime cutover or release candidate promotion.

integration_sequence.name: operational-handover
integration_sequence.description: Use the operational integration plan and final security summary as handover baseline for runtime onboarding.
